message:
feat(e2e): add seed reproducibility verification tests

e2e/tests/seed_reproducibility.rs: New test module implementing bd-mblr.4.3.2
requirements for deterministic seed verification:
- Tests proving same seed + config produce equivalent outputs
- Drift detection for artifact dimension divergence
- Cross-platform reproducibility sanity checks
- Integration with SEED_MANIFEST schema

beads: Updated issue status tracking for reproducibility verification
task progress.

Note: find_task.py excluded as ephemeral development utility.
